scope: repo-source skeleton and locator-only artifact boundary for OPL-hosted domain agents

repo_source_boundary.agent: stage descriptors, prompt refs, skill refs, knowledge refs, and domain entry metadata
repo_source_boundary.contracts: machine-readable descriptor, sidecar, quality gate, receipt, and artifact locator contracts
repo_source_boundary.runtime: sidecar, projection builder, lifecycle adapter, and dispatch helpers only
repo_source_boundary.docs: human-readable governance, status, roadmap, and migration notes
